name: speechdenoiser
license: UNRESOLVED (verified 2026-07-04): yuyun2000/SpeechDenoiser repo declares NO license. Per its README the 48k model is a DeepFilterNet3 re-export (upstream is MIT/Apache-2.0 dual), but the export itself carries no grant. Do NOT redistribute as a release asset until resolved — options: ask upstream to add a license, or re-export DFN3 from the dual-licensed source.
notes: 48 kHz native — zero-resampling path in the live engine. Heaviest per frame but still 4x realtime headroom on the dev machine.
